holes.name: JacobianChallenge.genus
holes.body:
def genus (X : Type u) [TopologicalSpace X] [T2Space X] [CompactSpace X] [ConnectedSpace X]
    [Nonempty X] [ChartedSpace ℂ X] [IsManifold (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω X] : ℕ := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.genus_eq_zero_iff_homeo
holes.body:
theorem genus_eq_zero_iff_homeo :
    genus X = 0 ↔ Nonempty (X ≃ₜ (Metric.sphere (0 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3)) 1)) :=
  sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian
holes.body:
def Jacobian (X : Type u) [TopologicalSpace X] [T2Space X] [CompactSpace X] [ConnectedSpace X]
    [Nonempty X] [ChartedSpace ℂ X] [IsManifold (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω X] : Type u := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.instAddCommGroup
holes.body: instance instAddCommGroup : AddCommGroup (Jacobian X) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.instTopologicalSpace
holes.body: instance instTopologicalSpace : TopologicalSpace (Jacobian X) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.instT2Space
holes.body: instance instT2Space : T2Space (Jacobian X) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.instCompactSpace
holes.body: instance instCompactSpace : CompactSpace (Jacobian X) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.instChartedSpace
holes.body: instance instChartedSpace : ChartedSpace (Fin (genus X) → ℂ) (Jacobian X) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.instIsManifold
holes.body:
instance instIsManifold :
    IsManifold (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ (Fin (genus X) → ℂ)) ω (Jacobian X) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.instLieAddGroup
holes.body:
instance instLieAddGroup :
    LieAddGroup (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ (Fin (genus X) → ℂ)) ω (Jacobian X) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.ofCurve
holes.body: def ofCurve (P : X) : X → Jacobian X := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.ofCurve_contMDiff
holes.body:
theorem ofCurve_contMDiff (P : X) :
    ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ)
      (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ (Fin (genus X) → ℂ)) ω (ofCurve P) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.ofCurve_self
holes.body: theorem ofCurve_self (P : X) : ofCurve P P = 0 := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.ofCurve_inj
holes.body: theorem ofCurve_inj (P : X) (h : 0 < genus X) : Function.Injective (ofCurve P) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pushforward
JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pushforward_contMDiff
holes.body:
theorem pushforward_contMDiff (f : X → Y)
    (hf : ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω f) :
    ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ (Fin (genus X) → ℂ))
      (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ (Fin (genus Y) → ℂ)) ω (pushforward f hf) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pushforward_id_apply
holes.body:
theorem pushforward_id_apply (P : Jacobian X) :
    pushforward id contMDiff_id P = P := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pushforward_comp_apply
holes.body:
theorem pushforward_comp_apply (f : X → Y)
    (hf : ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω f)
    (g : Y → Z) (hg : ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω g)
    (P : Jacobian X) :
    pushforward (g ∘ f) (hg.comp hf) P = pushforward g hg (pushforward f hf P) :=
  sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pullback
JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pullback_contMDiff
holes.body:
theorem pullback_contMDiff (f : X → Y)
    (hf : ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω f) :
    ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ (Fin (genus Y) → ℂ))
      (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ (Fin (genus X) → ℂ)) ω (pullback f hf) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pullback_id_apply
holes.body:
theorem pullback_id_apply (P : Jacobian X) :
    pullback id contMDiff_id P = P := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pullback_comp_apply
holes.body:
theorem pullback_comp_apply (f : X → Y)
    (hf : ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω f)
    (g : Y → Z) (hg : ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω g)
    (P : Jacobian Z) :
    pullback (g.comp f) (hg.comp hf) P = pullback f hf (pullback g hg P) := sorry

holes.name: JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.degree
JacobianChallenge.Jacobian.pushforward_pullback
holes.body:
theorem pushforward_pullback (f : X → Y)
    (hf : ContMDiff (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) (modelWithCornersSelf ℂ ℂ) ω f)
    (P : Jacobian Y) :
    pushforward f hf (pullback f hf P) = (degree f hf) • P := sorry
